TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tatipeluk, title = tatipeluk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tatipeluk} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == tatipeluk u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Áīô nu Amilika :paper nu Zipun :Áīô u canan ku tatipeluk(tatipelukśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku tatipeluk(tatipelukŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == tatip…ôr~…ĺuk u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :* nu amir~…ĺika :pap…ôr nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk(tatip…ôr~…ĺuk***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk(tatip…ôr~…ĺuk***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == tatipeluk u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :Áīô nu Amilika :paper nu Zipun :Áīô u canan ku tatipeluk(tatipelukśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku tatipeluk(tatipelukŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == tatip…ôr~…ĺuk u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :* nu amir~…ĺika :pap…ôr nu zipun :* u ¶anan ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk(tatip…ôr~…ĺuk***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku tatip…ôr~…ĺuk(tatip…ôr~…ĺuk***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
